citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1pm on April 28,
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone call, leaving a voicemail, waiting 30 minutes, then leaving
a second voicemail after second failed phone call attempt. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records
for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in
enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1pm on April 28, 
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone call, leaving a voicemail, waiting 30 minutes, then leaving 
a second voicemail after second failed phone call attempt. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records 
for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in 
enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
